title: Chapter 182
content:
Chapter 181

I guess I should talk to Zara about their duty timings. After last night, and with her current corruption count, it would be easy to talk to her.

After my morning routine, which was enough to put a certain bald man’s exercise routine to shame, I went to my room to take a natural bath and properly dress myself.

“Come in, Jack,” Valeria said in her usual soft tone, but with her trademark stoic expression.

I stepped inside to find the calculative noblewoman seated behind a large desk, made of oak, probably. That wasn’t there before, but maybe it was brought here yesterday or something.

I have to tell you though. Sitting behind that desk, Elara truly looked her commanding self, as she usually did. Not to mention elegant. That was some combination.

Her hair, mostly black with silver streaks, was neatly arranged, and her mature, voluptuous, and not to forget muscular figure was accentuated by a deep emerald gown that hugged her heavy tits and wide GILFY hips.

“Jack.” She said, her voice smooth as usual, but the command in it was undeniable.

“You will accompany me to the royal banquet in three days. I will be representing the family in my husband’s stead. Prepare yourself accordingly.”

Now that was something. She didn’t bother to explain anything to me. Well, as a noble, it was expected of her not to. But what got to me was, by what precedent would I be there?

Let me tell you, royal palaces were not places you could go just because you were a servant of some high-class noble.

Sure, I was happy about such early and easy access, but it was still something that bewildered me. Unless one was of absolute authority, like the king, bringing a commoner servant to the royal palace was still not something easy to do, even for someone like Carlson.

That only made me wonder how high up Elara’s authority went. There was another possibility, but that was a little too far-fetched to fool the royal palace.

Well, whatever. She must have a plan in mind. She wasn’t stupid to not consider these points.

Besides, it wasn’t a request anyway, so all I could do was agree because the decision had already been made by her.

I nodded respectfully and replied, “Understood, my Lady.”

Elara’s lips moved, and I swear I could detect something resembling a smile. A cunning smile, along with a hint of domination.

“Since you’re here.” She said, turning to me, “We might as well make the most of it.”

“Unfortunately, my vag… my pussy is sore from yesterday. And the feeble mana, although quite pure, you gave me yesterday, did little for me. So it would be better to put that ability of yours to a more efficient use.”

I couldn’t agree more if she was going in the direction I think she was going in.

“Valeria, Jack will have you today instead. I shall observe.”

And she didn’t disappoint.

Valeria remained expressionless and nodded simply once, accepting the order as if it were nothing more than her duty.

“Go on, Jack, you may begin.”

“O-on your desk?”

“Well, I told you I wish to observe, have I not?”

“Forgive me, my lady, for not following your order immediately. Do you wish to punish me?”

No, she didn’t, but it was imperative to establish a subservient image.

“No, I do not. Begin.”

She simply and dominantly said, her voice sharp without any space to argue.

“Right away, my lady.”
